question: Are the distinct parallel orange stripes visible on the nose/top casing of the drone?
Is the camera gimbal depicted with a spherical shape and a transparent protective cover?
Does the drone retain its four-arm structure with visible folding mechanisms/joints?
Is the drone presented in an isometric exploded view with components floating apart?
Are the propellers depicted as detached components floating above the motor arms?
Is the camera gimbal unit shown floating detached below the main body?
Are dashed or dotted guide lines used to connect the exploded components to their assembly points?
Are annotation boxes and leader lines positioned primarily on the right side of the image?
Does the image utilize clean technical line art with gray marker-style shading?
Is the color palette primarily grayscale with minimal orange accents?
Is the text within annotation boxes rendered as illegible scribbles or shorthand pseudo-text?
Does the background feature an aged or scanned paper texture?
Is the linework stable and crisp, avoiding wavy lines or blurred details?
Are there any hallucinations of extra limbs, propellers, or unconnected mechanical parts?
Are the geometric relationships between exploded parts logically aligned (e.g., propellers centered over motors)?
